title: alchemilla pubescens subvar. plicata
intro: Alchemilla pubescens subvar. plicata, also known as lady's mantle, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the family Rosaceae. Its leaves and stems have been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to their astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce bleeding. The plant's health benefits include its ability to calm digestive problems, reduce menstrual cramps, and promote wound healing. Alchemilla pubescens subvar. plicata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
